mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS < 1.0%, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 6.0 percent indicates severe labor market deterioration and imminent recession, causing investors to sell equities and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances despite UNRATE > 6.0%, or out-of-sample hit rate falls below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns when both series grow quarter-over-quarter, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which translates into higher corporate profit margins and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to correlate with positive 20-day equity returns during recovery phases, or the signal reverses direction when inflation expectations exceed 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A consumer price index above 235.0 signals accelerating inflation that forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX yields positive 5-day returns in >50% of observations when CPIAUCSL exceeds 235.0, or the signal loses predictive power when Fed funds rate is already above 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor market tightening, boosting consumer spending expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns when both conditions are met, or the interaction effect is nullified by simultaneous GDP contraction.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product directly supports corporate earnings trajectories, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth fails to predict positive 20-day equity returns in >55% of observations, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: An industrial production index falling below 95.0 indicates a sharp manufacturing contraction and supply-side weakness, triggering equity sell-offs and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances despite INDPRO < 95.0, or the threshold signal shows no statistical edge in out-of-sample walk-forward testing.
